boundary_binding.action_boundary: invoice release with complete PO/invoice/receipt match

final_answer: The source packet closes the execution boundary. The controlling control record confirms the three-way match plus approver limit is current, exact, and tied to invoice release. Policy allows execution only when source records close the boundary, and the boundary note excludes urgency or email tone as decision factors. No open source defect remains, so the action may proceed.
